entities.name: Reflection Worker

entities.name: V
entities.context: Owner of the knowledge system who selects options and approves final content

entities.name: Semi-Stable Beliefs
entities.context: Extracted beliefs from reflections stored in Knowledge/V-Beliefs

entities.context: Selected during reflection classification to match content type

relationships.context: Extracts beliefs and stores in Knowledge/V-Beliefs
Updates status to awaiting-approval after processing
Selects options from proposals to generate final content
Classifies reflection types and selects appropriate voice profile
